docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT TSENRENDOLGER TSELEEJAV IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO OCT-11-2017 AT 3:30PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSELEEJAV, TSENRENDOLGER $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00 SERVED MAY-30-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TSELEEJAV, TSENRENDOLGER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT TSELEEJAV, TSENRENDOLGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-11-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QA. DEFENDANT TSENRENDOLGER TSELEEJAV APPEARED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
